pytania.pytanie: How can Oracle Net mechanisms be used to increase the availability of database management system instances, including reducing the risk of database inaccessibility due to failure of the Oracle listener process or network interface? (Please describe whether the proposed mechanisms are applicable in the case of using the Easy Connect option.)

odpowiedzi.1: Pytanie opisowe - odpowiedź pisemna wymagana

pytania.pytanie: The head office must have a complete list of invoices, issued by a regional office by the end of the next business day. Both offices have their own DBMS instances. In such cases:

odpowiedzi.1: Issued by a regional office by the end of the next business day
odpowiedzi.2: Both offices have their own DBMS instances - in such cases
odpowiedzi.6: A vector database will be the best choice

pytania.pytanie: A table of products has been designed, which includes a column with a list of parts comprising the product. Individual part names in this column are comma-separated. Such a table:

odpowiedzi.1: Is in the first normal form
odpowiedzi.2: Is in the second normal form
odpowiedzi.3: Is in the third normal form

pytania.pytanie: A client application implemented using .NET can:

odpowiedzi.1: Execute SQL SELECT statements on a remote database
odpowiedzi.2: Execute SQL INSERT statements on a remote database
odpowiedzi.3: Be used for SQL injection attack attempts
odpowiedzi.4: Execute parametrised queries, but this is not recommended

pytania.pytanie: Big Data is defined as:

odpowiedzi.1: High value data

pytania.pytanie: A table in the second normal form:

odpowiedzi.1: Contains a primary key
odpowiedzi.3: Can include one column for all address data, i.e. (city, street, house number)
odpowiedzi.4: Can contain a composite primary key
odpowiedzi.5: Is also a table in the third normal form
odpowiedzi.6: Includes no columns that depend on a part of the primary key only

pytania.pytanie: The benefits of using a stored procedure compared to executing a batch of SQL statements include:

odpowiedzi.1: Improved performance
odpowiedzi.2: Portability of the code among different DBMSs
odpowiedzi.3: The ability not to use SQL at all
odpowiedzi.4: The ability to easily execute the same sequence of SQL statements from client applications implemented with different programming languages

pytania.pytanie: There is a need to easily find all buildings located no more than 500 meters from the nearest highway and not owned by the city hall. To answer such a query:

odpowiedzi.1: Regular RDBMS should be used
odpowiedzi.4: A vector layer of buildings and a vector layer of highways should be obtained
odpowiedzi.5: A raster layer of buildings and a raster layer of highways should be obtained

pytania.pytanie: Please describe why Apache Hadoop is used for storing Big Data. Is Apache Hadoop a relational database management system? If not, what are the differences? (In addition: does Apache Hadoop rely on a schema-on-read or a schema-on-write approach, and which of these approaches is more appropriate for Big Data storage and why?)

odpowiedzi.1: Pytanie opisowe - odpowiedź pisemna wymagana

pytania.pytanie: A table in the first normal form:

odpowiedzi.1: Contains a primary key
odpowiedzi.3: Can include one column for all address data i.e. (city, street, house number)
odpowiedzi.4: Can contain a composite foreign key
odpowiedzi.5: Includes no columns that depend on a part of the primary key only

pytania.pytanie: A many-to-many relation has been identified between tables A and B. This means:

odpowiedzi.1: Foreign keys have to be added to both of the tables
odpowiedzi.2: A new table with one foreign key is needed
odpowiedzi.3: A new table with two foreign keys and a primary key is needed
odpowiedzi.4: A new table without foreign keys is needed
odpowiedzi.5: A new table with two foreign keys and no primary key is needed

pytania.pytanie: In case of failure, an Oracle database should be recovered as soon as possible till the moment preceding the failure. To make it possible, the following actions should be performed:

odpowiedzi.1: Whole backups should be created regularly
odpowiedzi.2: Incremental backups should be created regularly
odpowiedzi.4: As it is not possible to recover a database beyond the time of the last backup, backups have to be created every few minutes
odpowiedzi.5: Operating system tools have to be used for making copies of a database while the database is used to make sure that recent backups exist

pytania.pytanie: An UPDATE SQL statement is executed. It encounters an exclusive lock. If so:

odpowiedzi.1: It will overwrite data without waiting for a lock to be released
odpowiedzi.2: It will be suspended until the lock is released
odpowiedzi.3: An error will be returned to the client application which has submitted the UPDATE SQL statement
odpowiedzi.4: The transaction will be rolled back

pytania.pytanie: NoSQL platforms:

odpowiedzi.1: Are defined through mathematical theory
odpowiedzi.2: Use SQL as a primary way of interacting with the data
odpowiedzi.3: Do not use SQL as a primary way of interacting with the data
odpowiedzi.4: Do not use SQL at all

pytania.pytanie: Please describe the idea of a RAG system. Which kind of database is used by RAG solutions and why? (In addition: do RAG systems rely on exact or approximate search in a database? Please justify your answer.)

odpowiedzi.1: Pytanie opisowe - odpowiedź pisemna wymagana

pytania.pytanie: A software developer wants to migrate an existing Java-based application relying on MS SQL Server (including 50 tables) to a NoSQL platform, such as Apache HBase. This means:

odpowiedzi.1: Only a change of the JDBC driver
odpowiedzi.2: Typically a major change in the physical data model
odpowiedzi.3: Major changes caused by no support for SQL in Apache HBase
odpowiedzi.4: The benefits from the use of secondary indexes available in Apache HBase

pytania.pytanie: In the tax office database, there is a need to frequently search for citizens within the MS SQL Server database based on the name and surname of the person, both of which are provided at each time. To search efficiently, a reasonable solution is to:

odpowiedzi.1: Create two clustered indexes in the table
odpowiedzi.2: Create two unclustered indexes in the table, one for name and one for surname
odpowiedzi.3: Create one clustered index and one unclustered index, one for name and one for surname
odpowiedzi.4: Create one unclustered index including both name and surname

pytania.pytanie: A physical data model:

odpowiedzi.1: Is developed after the DBMS platform is selected
odpowiedzi.3: Is developed instead of a logical data model
odpowiedzi.4: Is more intuitive for business users than the corresponding logical model
odpowiedzi.5: Is very similar to the logical data model when the use of a NoSQL platform is planned

pytania.pytanie: CAP theorem:

odpowiedzi.1: States that only two out of three features (Consistency, Availability, Partition tolerance) are possible at the same time
odpowiedzi.2: States that only one out of three features (Consistency, Availability, Partition tolerance) is possible at the same time
odpowiedzi.3: States that all three features (Consistency, Availability, Partition tolerance) are possible at the same time
odpowiedzi.4: States that all three features (Consistency, Availability, Portability) are possible at the same time
odpowiedzi.5: Has been developed to address the way relational databases deployed on a single server can be configured

pytania.pytanie: A table in third normal form:

odpowiedzi.1: Contains primary key
odpowiedzi.3: Can include one column for all address data, i.e. (city, street, house number)
odpowiedzi.4: Can contain a composite primary key
odpowiedzi.5: Can contain columns which depend on other columns, which are not a part of the primary key
odpowiedzi.6: Can include columns that depend on a part of a primary key only
